description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top. The rifle features a two-tone color scheme, primarily matte black with olive or tan accents on the stock, barrel shroud, and receiver. It is equipped with a fixed, adjustable stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. A bipod is attached near the front of the barrel, providing stability for precision shooting. The overall design is robust and tactical, suitable for long-range engagements in urban or open environments.
description: A modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, bipod, and two-tone black and olive/tan finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs, and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, scope, fixed stock, pistol grip, and bipod.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock, pistol grip, and the symmetry of the rifle's components.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, scope, and bipod, mirroring the details of the other side.
